message:
[wake trigger] You are being woken up by a scheduled `wake` entry. The human is only reachable via Telegram right now — do NOT send status, progress, or the final answer to any terminal pane. Every user-facing output must go in the Telegram reply to this request. If the task requires background work, keep it terse and summarize in the reply.

Work on: kyc-cli + ssh terminal

In THIS turn you must:
1. Do real work — make concrete edits, run tool calls, commit/push. Minimum 3 substantive actions on the codebase. No read-only browsing.
2. Post a concise progress report summarizing what changed this turn (files touched, commits made, tests run).
3. If the task is NOT done, self-reschedule by running this shell command verbatim:
   wake add claude --in 30m --work --caller telegram --chat-id 7815518351 "kyc-cli + ssh terminal"
4. If the task IS done, say so plainly and do not reschedule.

Do not reply with a report-only message. Real work must happen before the report.
